summary: Bootstrapped canonical target-repo report files for this task.

Root-package OpenAPI validation passed with go test . -run TestOpenAPISpecValidates -count=1; a broader go test ./... attempt was blocked by workspace disk exhaustion, so contract evidence is based on the targeted validation plus direct handler/route inspection.
